raw_consumer_statement:
Filed dispute with Citi over purchase of XXXX XXXX  on XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX Citi says that they have contacted the merchant. 

XXXX XXXX XXXX  Citi says the merchant has responded and they are reviewing details. 

XXXX XXXX XXXX  Citi says they have completed their investigation and marked the case " customer responsible. '' Dispute letter was never given so details of their investigation are unknown to me. 

XXXX XXXX XXXX  Decided to reach out to original merchant by email again to see if I could get any details. 
Merchant for disputed charge said filing a dispute was the correct method for getting the order cancelled. Merchant said citi never contacted them during or after the supposed " investigation '' period. 

Merchant says citi never contacted them. I was never given any evidence from citi that they communicated with merchant.
